Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10860 0 0}Wouldn't it be funny if all my knee problems turned out to be growing pains?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}But, honestly, I don't wanna get any bigger than I am right now. It's not like I'm gonna go into pro wrestling.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}Oh, you can have my rice if you want... Here, take it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10877 0 0}{f 5 13 8 15 105}What, you think I'm a bread guy just 'cause I don't want my rice?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 105 1 25 25}Y'know, I honestly was not expecting you to say that. Didn't take you for a jokester.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Miyamoto seems to be having fun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10824 0 0}{f 5 13 8 30 105}Yeah. I gotta watch what I eat these days so I can build muscle mass.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}I'll do whatever it takes to win the regionals... Remember, it's all about the mindset, {f 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Miyamoto has shown me his resolve.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10827 0 0}Dude, you think my dedication is that weak? Remember, I'm ready 24/7.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}I always keep my body in perfect condition... 'Cept my knee right now, I guess.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Miyamoto looks a little sullen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10869 0 0}Ugh, dammit... I really do want some rice. Just having it right in front of me is torture...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 105 0 25 25}No, I gotta snap out of it. This is perfect mental training. Go ahead and eat it, {f 4 1}![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}C'mon, just shovel it down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After finishing the meal under Miyamoto's[n]watch, I headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
